{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321135237269147E0F9BF99DEE9EA"}"},"total":350},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379526149662131006","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"思维清晰，剧情引人深思，人物形象描述的很生动有趣。要是能有配图那就更好了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718182803,"group_id":"7371719123304188952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我这一生；需要足够的自由和浪漫 爱与被爱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7kbSMuRju5Mq+TeP6DxutXrqlO+TLg1fD7yVRLnRF4y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d07f4586a6a943d4bac285e40c78042c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624397&x-signature=Yr5YD1%2FiXniTCxzpf9llDQ6einQ%3D","user_id":"1244260921254284","user_name":"万石赫章"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1244260921254284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1660283694,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371719123304188952","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空历史+六国并存+女帝反推】
郑善良穿越而来，觉醒权臣系统，成为年幼女帝的托孤大臣，只要帮助女帝一统六国，就能死后成仙？
条件是，此生只能使用符合权臣身份的计谋？
他权倾朝野，掌管镇北20万大军，百官畏他如畏虎！
——
女帝刚登基，草原派出使者献上藏宝图，假意求和。
藏宝图中藏有匕首，想要刺杀女帝。
当众击杀草原使者后。
某大臣：“女帝年幼，我朝不应在起争端，应当作无事发生，议和换取和平。”
郑善良：“议和个屁，刺杀到脸上来了，本太师亲自率兵打他们！”
兵部尚书：“不可，大周二百年来从未战胜草原，应当议和。”
郑善良：“找个人把带有瘟疫的尸体扔到北方草原的水源上游，危机自解。”
草原瘟疫爆发，死伤过半。
百官：“权臣手段毒辣，有伤天和，实乃我朝之悲。”
——
女帝成年时。
百官齐齐上书建议：“女帝成年，为巩固国本，应扩充后宫，诞下子嗣，可娶邻国皇子为男宠，以示两国友好！”
“郑太师乃六国第一权臣，不肯交出监国之权，应诛杀午门，还女帝亲政。”
郑善良：“谁说的，拉出去斩了，女帝成年又如何，那是本太师娘子！”
女帝：“夫君说的对。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe52bd7ff26f8175a355ffe80747ad5be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"又子多多","author_id":"","book_id":"7371719123304188952","book_name":"权倾朝野后，小女帝成了玩具","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4368人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7371719165737976344","read_count":"4368","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"659135"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"320","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,女帝,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/11051818909ec278314ed0cbb96c7722~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256357&x-signature=BzvdzNw7N%2BgmFTf97gmqzIJ2j3c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3416915429820748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321135237269147E0F9BF99DEE9EA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_coun
